title: Only one with Shadi_SAT_Seed.json + "Phase III-A" naming
public_claim: Red Team Phase III-A handoff is a method packet anchored by Shadi_SAT_Seed.json and a lossless core specification.
distinctive_mechanism: It uses Intake, Sources, Assumptions, Sessions, Session Ledger, and Starter Implementation Packet materials to turn a seed project into a reference dataset and a reusable red-team implementation starting point.
use_value: It matters because it links an actual SAT seed to the Red Team Lab's memory and replay machinery.
